productDisplayName: Probase Unisex Solid Navy Blue Caps
description: Created using blended cotton fabric, this bucket cap from probase is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Wear it in summers or winters and keep yourself safe from the sun. Crown made of soft cotton fabric to offer breathable comfort Has a wide downwards sloping brim Stitch detailing on the cap for enhanced durability Brand tag on the rim Cap care Hand wash in warm water at 40 degrees Do not wring, bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry
